log.title: Single-Dimensional Arrays
log.notes: Declaring, initializing and walking through arrays. The exercises on searching and counting occurrences were where it clicked: an array is just a fixed box of values, and most of the work is deciding how to walk through it.

log.title: Methods
log.notes: Parameters, return types and overloading. Splitting a problem into small methods made the harder exercises feel a lot less scary than writing everything in main.
